title: . Suspension and/or cancellation of license or authority. The Minister of Labor shall have the
content:
. Suspension and/or cancellation of license or authority. The Minister of Labor shall have the 
power to suspend or cancel any license or authority to recruit employees for overseas employment for 
7

violation of rules and regulations issued by the Ministry of Labor, the Overseas Employment Development 
Board, or for violation of the provisions of this and other applicable laws, General Orders and Letters of 
Instructions. 
Chapter III 
MISCELLANEOUS PROVISIONS
